content.full_text:
December 14, 1976


Robert N. Gulick
Executive Director
Drywall Industry Trust Fund
9800 South Sepulveda Blvd.
Los Angeles, California 90045

Dear Mr. Gulick:

     Your request to change your method of recording and
reporting general lobbyist expenses from an accrual basis
to a cash basis is hearby granted.

     Please contact me if I can be of further assistance.

                                        Sincerely,


                                        Rich Fichman
                                        Compliance Representative

RE:bw

     bcc:  Jeanne P.

[The text on this pink document is heavily faded and difficult to read. Most of the content is illegible due to the poor contrast and image quality. There appear to be several paragraphs of text, but the specific words cannot be reliably transcribed. At the bottom of the page, there appears to be a date that looks like it might read "4 August 1924" or similar, but this is also quite unclear.]

Drywall Industry Trust Fund                    December 8, 1976                    9800 South Sepulveda Blvd.
                                                                                            Los Angeles, Calif. 90045
                                                                                            Phone (213) 776-4555

Mr. Rick Eichman
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
1100 K Street
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Mr. Eichman:

We would like permission to change our reports for lobbying expenses from the
accrual to the cash basis of accounting. This would be for the lobbyist's per-
sonal overhead only.

Sincerely yours,

[signature]
Robert N. Gulick
Executive Director

RNG:mkh

ol match 11 ol 20d

[illegible]

sections.question: We would like permission to change our reports for lobbying expenses from the accrual to the cash basis of accounting. This would be for the lobbyist's personal overhead only.
sections.conclusion: Your request to change your method of recording and reporting general lobbyist expenses from an accrual basis to a cash basis is hereby granted.
sections.question_synthetic: Can the Drywall Industry Trust Fund change its method of recording and reporting general lobbyist expenses from an accrual basis to a cash basis?
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC grants the request to change from accrual basis to cash basis accounting for lobbyist expenses.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Document contains duplicate/overlapping text suggesting scanning or OCR errors. Core Q/C sections identified despite image quality issues. Two distinct letters visible (one dated 12/14/76 granting approval, one dated 12/8/76 making the request). Confidence reduced due to document corruption.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: We would like permission to change our reports for lobbying expenses from the accrual to the cash basis of accounting. This would be for the lobbyist's personal overhead only.

CONCLUSION: Your request to change your method of recording and reporting general lobbyist expenses from an accrual basis to a cash basis is hereby granted.
